documentation:
## Aliyun ROS MEMCACHE Construct Library

This module is part of the AliCloud ROS Cloud Development Kit (ROS CDK) project.

```python
import * as MEMCACHE from '@alicloud/ros-cdk-memcache';
```

methods.name: ros_cdk_memcache.Instance.__init__
documentation:
Param scope - scope in which this resource is defined Param id - scoped id of the resource Param props - resource properties.

```
param scope



param id



param props



param enable_resource_property_constraint

```

methods.name: ros_cdk_memcache.Instance.attr_connection_domain
documentation: Attribute ConnectionDomain: The internal endpoint of the instance.

methods.name: ros_cdk_memcache.Instance.attr_instance_id
documentation: Attribute InstanceId: The globally unique identifier (GUID) of the instance.

methods.name: ros_cdk_memcache.Instance.attr_instance_name
documentation: Attribute InstanceName: The name of the instance.

methods.name: ros_cdk_memcache.Instance.attr_port
documentation: Attribute Port: Port of created instance.

methods.name: ros_cdk_memcache.Instance.attr_qps
documentation: Attribute QPS: QPS.

This class encapsulates and extends the ROS resource type ALIYUN::Memcache::Instance\`\`ALIYUN::MEMCACHE::Instance is used to create an ApsaraDB for Memcache (OCS) instance.

```
Note

```

This class may have some new functions to facilitate development, so it is recommended to use this class instead of RosInstance\`\`for a more convenient development experience.
See <https://www.alibabacloud.com/help/ros/developer-reference/aliyun-memcache-instance>

methods.name: ros_cdk_memcache.InstanceProps.__init__
documentation:
Properties for defining a `Instance`.

See <https://www.alibabacloud.com/help/ros/developer-reference/aliyun-memcache-instance>

```
param auto_renew

Property autoRenew: Specifies whether to enable auto renewal. Valid values: true false Note Default value: false.

param auto_renew_period

Property autoRenewPeriod: The period of the auto renewal. Unit: months. Valid values: 1 2 3 6 12 Note You must specify this parameter if the value of the AutoRenew parameter is true.

param auto_use_coupon

Property autoUseCoupon: Specifies whether to use a coupon. Valid values: true false Note Default value: false.

param backup_policy

Property backupPolicy: Backup policy.

param capacity

Property capacity: The storage capacity of the instance. Unit: MB. Note You need to pass at least one of the Capacity and InstanceClass parameters when calling the CreateInstance operation.

param charge_type

Property chargeType: The billing method of the instance. Valid values: PrePaid: subscription. PostPaid: pay-as-you-go. Note Default value: PostPaid.

param config

Property config: The parameter configuration of the instance, in a JSON string. For more information, see Set parameters.

param coupon_no

Property couponNo: The coupon number. Default value: youhuiquan_promotion_option_id_for_blank.

param instance_class

Property instanceClass: The instance type. For more information, see Instance types. Note You need to pass at least one of the Capacity and InstanceClass parameters when calling the CreateInstance operation.

param instance_name

Property instanceName: The name of the instance. The name can be 2 to 128 characters in length and must start with a letter. The following characters are not supported: at signs (@), forward slashes (/), colons (:), equal signs (=), double quotation marks ("), angle brackets (<>), braces ([]), curly brackets ({}) and spaces.

param network_type

Property networkType: The network type of the instance. Valid values: CLASSIC VPC Note Default value: CLASSIC.

param password

Property password: The password of the instance. The password can be 8 to 32 characters in length and must contain at least three types of the following characters: uppercase letters, lowercase letters, digits, and special characters. Special characters include ! at signs (@), number signs (#), dollar signs ($), percent signs (%), carets (^), ampersands (&), asterisks (*), parentheses (()), underscores (_), plus signs (+), hyphens (-), and equal signs (=).

param period

Property period: The subscription period. You must specify this parameter if the value of the ChargeType parameter is PrePaid. Unit: months. Valid values: 1, 2, 3, 4, 5, 6, 7, 8, 9, 12, 24, and 36. Note This parameter is invalid if the value of the ChargeType parameter is PostPaid.

param private_ip_address

Property privateIpAddress: The internal IP address of the instance. Note The internal IP address must be located in the Classless Inter-Domain Routing (CIDR) block of the VSwitch to which the instance belongs.

param resource_group_id

Property resourceGroupId: Resource group ID.

param vpc_id

Property vpcId: The ID of the VPC.

param vpc_password_free

Property vpcPasswordFree: Specifies whether to enable password free for access within the VPC. If set to: - true: enables password free. - false: disables password free.

param v_switch_id

Property vSwitchId: The ID of the VSwitch.

param zone_id

Property zoneId: The ID of the zone in which the instance is created. You can call the DescribeRegions operation to query the latest region list.
```

methods.name: ros_cdk_memcache.InstanceProps.auto_renew
documentation:
Property autoRenew: Specifies whether to enable auto renewal.

Valid values:
true
false
Note Default value: false.

methods.name: ros_cdk_memcache.InstanceProps.auto_renew_period
documentation:
Property autoRenewPeriod: The period of the auto renewal.

Unit: months. Valid values:
1
2
3
6
12
Note You must specify this parameter if the value of the AutoRenew parameter is true.

methods.name: ros_cdk_memcache.InstanceProps.auto_use_coupon
documentation:
Property autoUseCoupon: Specifies whether to use a coupon.

Valid values:
true
false
Note Default value: false.

methods.name: ros_cdk_memcache.InstanceProps.backup_policy
documentation: Property backupPolicy: Backup policy.

methods.name: ros_cdk_memcache.InstanceProps.capacity
documentation:
Property capacity: The storage capacity of the instance.

Unit: MB.
Note You need to pass at least one of the Capacity and InstanceClass parameters when calling
the CreateInstance operation.

methods.name: ros_cdk_memcache.InstanceProps.charge_type
documentation:
Property chargeType: The billing method of the instance.

Valid values:
PrePaid: subscription.
PostPaid: pay-as-you-go.
Note Default value: PostPaid.

methods.name: ros_cdk_memcache.InstanceProps.config
documentation:
Property config: The parameter configuration of the instance, in a JSON string.

For more information,
see Set parameters.

methods.name: ros_cdk_memcache.InstanceProps.coupon_no
documentation:
Property couponNo: The coupon number.

Default value: youhuiquan_promotion_option_id_for_blank.

methods.name: ros_cdk_memcache.InstanceProps.instance_class
documentation:
Property instanceClass: The instance type.

For more information, see Instance types.
Note You need to pass at least one of the Capacity and InstanceClass parameters when calling
the CreateInstance operation.

methods.name: ros_cdk_memcache.InstanceProps.instance_name
documentation:
Property instanceName: The name of the instance.

The name can be 2 to 128 characters in length and must start
with a letter. The following characters are not supported: at signs (@), forward slashes (/), colons (:), equal signs (=), double quotation marks
("), angle brackets (<>), braces ([]), curly brackets ({}) and spaces.

methods.name: ros_cdk_memcache.InstanceProps.network_type
documentation:
Property networkType: The network type of the instance.

Valid values:
CLASSIC
VPC
Note Default value: CLASSIC.

methods.name: ros_cdk_memcache.InstanceProps.password
documentation:
Property password: The password of the instance.

The password can be 8 to 32 characters in length and
must contain at least three types of the following characters: uppercase letters,
lowercase letters, digits, and special characters. Special characters include ! at signs (@), number signs (#), dollar signs ($), percent signs (%), carets (^),
ampersands (&), asterisks (*), parentheses (()), underscores (_), plus signs (+),
hyphens (-), and equal signs (=).

methods.name: ros_cdk_memcache.InstanceProps.period
documentation:
Property period: The subscription period.

You must specify this parameter if the value of the ChargeType
parameter is PrePaid. Unit: months. Valid values: 1, 2, 3, 4, 5, 6, 7, 8, 9, 12, 24,
and 36.
Note This parameter is invalid if the value of the ChargeType parameter is PostPaid.

methods.name: ros_cdk_memcache.InstanceProps.private_ip_address
documentation:
Property privateIpAddress: The internal IP address of the instance.

Note The internal IP address must be located in the Classless Inter-Domain Routing (CIDR)
block of the VSwitch to which the instance belongs.

methods.name: ros_cdk_memcache.InstanceProps.resource_group_id
documentation: Property resourceGroupId: Resource group ID.

methods.name: ros_cdk_memcache.InstanceProps.vpc_id
documentation: Property vpcId: The ID of the VPC.

methods.name: ros_cdk_memcache.InstanceProps.vpc_password_free
documentation:
Property vpcPasswordFree: Specifies whether to enable password free for access within the VPC.

If set to:

- true: enables password free.
- false: disables password free.

methods.name: ros_cdk_memcache.InstanceProps.v_switch_id
documentation: Property vSwitchId: The ID of the VSwitch.

methods.name: ros_cdk_memcache.InstanceProps.zone_id
documentation:
Property zoneId: The ID of the zone in which the instance is created.

You can call the DescribeRegions operation to query the latest region list.

documentation:
---
param enable_backup_log: true
param preferred_backup_period: true
param preferred_backup_time: true
---

methods.name: ros_cdk_memcache.RosInstance.BackupPolicyProperty.preferred_backup_period
documentation: :Property: preferredBackupPeriod: The backup cycle. Only for PostPaid instance. Valid values: Monday/Tuesday/Wednesday/Thursday/Friday/Saturday/Sunday

methods.name: ros_cdk_memcache.RosInstance.BackupPolicyProperty.preferred_backup_time
documentation: :Property: preferredBackupTime: The time period in which data is backed up. The time period must be in the HH:mmZ-HH:mmZ format.

methods.name: ros_cdk_memcache.RosInstance.BackupPolicyProperty.enable_backup_log
documentation:
:Property:

enableBackupLog: Enable or disable incremental backup. Options:
1, means open.
0, which means off, the default value.

This class is a base encapsulation around the ROS resource type ALIYUN::Memcache::Instance\`\`ALIYUN::MEMCACHE::Instance is used to create an ApsaraDB for Memcache (OCS) instance.

```
Note

```

This class does not contain additional functions, so it is recommended to use the `Instance` class instead of this class for a more convenient development experience.
See <https://www.alibabacloud.com/help/ros/developer-reference/aliyun-memcache-instance>

methods.name: ros_cdk_memcache.RosInstanceProps.auto_renew_period
documentation:
:Property:

autoRenewPeriod: The period of the auto renewal. Unit: months. Valid values:
1
2
3
6
12
Note You must specify this parameter if the value of the AutoRenew parameter is true.

methods.name: ros_cdk_memcache.RosInstanceProps.auto_use_coupon
documentation:
:Property:

autoUseCoupon: Specifies whether to use a coupon. Valid values:
true
false
Note Default value: false.

methods.name: ros_cdk_memcache.RosInstanceProps.backup_policy
documentation: :Property: backupPolicy: Backup policy

methods.name: ros_cdk_memcache.RosInstanceProps.capacity
documentation:
:Property:

capacity: The storage capacity of the instance. Unit: MB.
Note You need to pass at least one of the Capacity and InstanceClass parameters when calling
the CreateInstance operation.

methods.name: ros_cdk_memcache.RosInstanceProps.charge_type
documentation:
:Property:

chargeType: The billing method of the instance. Valid values:
PrePaid: subscription.
PostPaid: pay-as-you-go.
Note Default value: PostPaid.

methods.name: ros_cdk_memcache.RosInstanceProps.config
documentation:
:Property:

config: The parameter configuration of the instance, in a JSON string. For more information,
see Set parameters.

methods.name: ros_cdk_memcache.RosInstanceProps.coupon_no
documentation: :Property: couponNo: The coupon number. Default value: youhuiquan_promotion_option_id_for_blank.

methods.name: ros_cdk_memcache.RosInstanceProps.instance_class
documentation:
:Property:

instanceClass: The instance type. For more information, see Instance types.
Note You need to pass at least one of the Capacity and InstanceClass parameters when calling
the CreateInstance operation.

methods.name: ros_cdk_memcache.RosInstanceProps.instance_name
documentation:
```
), forward slashes (/), colons (:), equal signs (=), double quotation marks
```

("), angle brackets (\<>), braces ([]), curly brackets ({}) and spaces.
\:Property:

instanceName: The name of the instance. The name can be 2 to 128 characters in length and must start
with a letter. The following characters are not supported: at signs (

methods.name: ros_cdk_memcache.RosInstanceProps.network_type
documentation:
:Property:

networkType: The network type of the instance. Valid values:
CLASSIC
VPC
Note Default value: CLASSIC.

methods.name: ros_cdk_memcache.RosInstanceProps.password
documentation:
```
), number signs (#), dollar signs ($), percent signs (%), carets (^),
```

ampersands (&), asterisks (\*), parentheses (()), underscores (\_), plus signs (+),
hyphens (-), and equal signs (=).
\:Property:

password: The password of the instance. The password can be 8 to 32 characters in length and
must contain at least three types of the following characters: uppercase letters,
lowercase letters, digits, and special characters. Special characters include ! at signs (

methods.name: ros_cdk_memcache.RosInstanceProps.period
documentation:
:Property:

period: The subscription period. You must specify this parameter if the value of the ChargeType
parameter is PrePaid. Unit: months. Valid values: 1, 2, 3, 4, 5, 6, 7, 8, 9, 12, 24,
and 36.
Note This parameter is invalid if the value of the ChargeType parameter is PostPaid.

methods.name: ros_cdk_memcache.RosInstanceProps.private_ip_address
documentation:
:Property:

privateIpAddress: The internal IP address of the instance.
Note The internal IP address must be located in the Classless Inter-Domain Routing (CIDR)
block of the VSwitch to which the instance belongs.

methods.name: ros_cdk_memcache.RosInstanceProps.resource_group_id
documentation: :Property: resourceGroupId: Resource group ID.

methods.name: ros_cdk_memcache.RosInstanceProps.vpc_id
documentation: :Property: vpcId: The ID of the VPC.

methods.name: ros_cdk_memcache.RosInstanceProps.vpc_password_free
documentation:
:Property:

vpcPasswordFree: Specifies whether to enable password free for access within the VPC. If set to:

- true: enables password free.
- false: disables password free.

methods.name: ros_cdk_memcache.RosInstanceProps.v_switch_id
documentation: :Property: vSwitchId: The ID of the VSwitch.

methods.name: ros_cdk_memcache.RosInstanceProps.zone_id
documentation: :Property: zoneId: The ID of the zone in which the instance is created. You can call the DescribeRegions operation to query the latest region list.

This class is a base encapsulation around the ROS resource type `ALIYUN::Memcache::Whitelist`, which is used to create a Whitelist.

```
Note

```

This class does not contain additional functions, so it is recommended to use the `Whitelist` class instead of this class for a more convenient development experience.
See <https://www.alibabacloud.com/help/ros/developer-reference/aliyun-memcache-whitelist>

This class encapsulates and extends the ROS resource type `ALIYUN::Memcache::Whitelist`, which is used to create a Whitelist.

```
Note

```

This class may have some new functions to facilitate development, so it is recommended to use this class instead of RosWhitelist\`\`for a more convenient development experience.
See <https://www.alibabacloud.com/help/ros/developer-reference/aliyun-memcache-whitelist>

methods.name: ros_cdk_memcache.WhitelistProps.__init__
documentation:
Properties for defining a `Whitelist`.

See <https://www.alibabacloud.com/help/ros/developer-reference/aliyun-memcache-whitelist>

```
param instance_id

Property instanceId: Instance ID (globally unique).

param security_ips

Property securityIps: IP address whitelist to be modified.

param security_ip_group_attribute

Property securityIpGroupAttribute: The default is empty. For distinguishing between different attribute values, the console will not display the value of hidden whitelist packet.

param security_ip_group_name

Property securityIpGroupName: Whitelist group.
```
